full_text:
Yan Gan (Gongzhong) 嚴幹 (公仲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Gan (嚴幹), styledGongzhong (公仲), was born in Zuopingyi. Established a local self defence group, his advice led to the capture of Gao Gan. Yan Gan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Yan Gan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
